messages.content: Hi! How can I help you today?

Hi! I recently bought a digital camera from your store, but it doesn’t zoom in as much as I was hoping. I use it mainly for bird-watching, so I really need something with the maximum zoom possible. I’d like to exchange it for a camera with the highest zoom capacity you have, but I want all the other features to stay the same. Price isn’t an issue, and I’d like to get this sorted out as quickly as possible. Can you help me with this?
